TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tjuavanaq Itiniay i Daren Cen no Taitung ko Tjuavanaq a niyaro', 39 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 89 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 88 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan98%, Puyuma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tjo~u~uab~vana* itiniaj i ɬ~ɮarən ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u tjo~u~uab~vana* a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan**%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Tjuavanaq Itiniay i Daren Cen no Taitung ko Tjuavanaq a niyaro', 39 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 89 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 88 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan98%, Puyuma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tjo~u~uab~vana* itiniaj i ɬ~ɮarən ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u tjo~u~uab~vana* a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan**%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
